blocker_01_evidence: Stage 01 output: 'Computing SHA256 of .../blueedge-platform-v3_23_0-COMPLETE.tar [EXTERNAL_ABSOLUTE]' — no ValueError; boundary result PASS. Same confirmation in run_client_pipeline.py Phase 1: 'PASS: Archive present, SHA256 verified'. classify_path() helper working correctly.
blocker_02_evidence: Stage 06 output: run_client_pipeline.py Phase 2 prints '[PATH-RESOLUTION] FAIL: intake path not found. Checked: clients/blueedge/psee/runs/run_blueedge_e2e_execute_01/intake / clients/6a6fcdbc.../psee/intake/canonical_repo' — no KeyError crash; hybrid fallback working; FAIL is expected because stage 02 never populated the CLIENT_RUN intake path.
new_blocker_summary: source_intake.py --validate-only step_inventory() checks UUID extracted_path canonical_repo exclusively; returns inventory_result FAIL and exits 1 when UUID path absent; causes stage 01 CASCADE failure; stages 02-05 NOT_ATTEMPTED; intake directory never written to run_blueedge_e2e_execute_01; stage 06 CLIENT_RUN fallback finds no intake. Resolution requires step_inventory() hybrid path resolution: check run_dir/intake (CLIENT_RUN) first, fall back to UUID extracted_path (EXTRACTED_PATH), same pattern as BLOCKER-02 fix for run_client_pipeline.py phases 2+3.
new_blocker_root_cause: step_inventory() calls source_manifest['extracted_path'] without fallback; UUID path clients/6a6fcdbc-41b6-4e0e-99b9-37394f6c870d/psee/intake/canonical_repo does not exist for fresh execution runs; inventory exits 1; validate-only mode propagates FAIL to intake_result and sys.exit(1)
cascade_path: BLOCKER-06 → stage 01 BLOCKED_STAGE_FAILURE → stage 02 NOT_ATTEMPTED → stage 03-05 NOT_ATTEMPTED → stage 06 CLIENT_RUN intake path absent → BLOCKED_STAGE_06
